name: Jal Jeevan Mission
benefit_description: Functional household tap connection(FHTC) to households, Schools, Anganwadi centres, GP buildings, Health centres, wellness centres and community buildings. (Priority in quality affected areas, villages in drought prone and desert areas) ﻿ The scheme shall provide FHTC in every household with three
details: The programme will also implement source sustainability measures as mandatory elements, such as recharge and reuse through grey water management, water conservation, rainwater harvesting. ﻿ The Jal Jeevan Mission will be based on a community approach to water and will include extensive Information, Education and communication as a key component of the mission. ﻿ Objectives: The broad objectives of the Mission are to provide FHTC to every rural household, schools, anganwadi centres, GP buildings,
eligibility_text: This scheme is applicable to all households in rural India.
application_url: The applicant need not apply for the scheme. ﻿ State Governments/ UT Administration will implement the mission based on the finalized SAP with timelines to cover all the villages of the respective Sta
